import RequestSchema from '@theme/RequestSchema';

import Heading from '@theme/Heading';

<Heading as={'h1'} className={'openapi__heading'} children={'Get channel CDN security keys'}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={'get'} path={'/{channelId}/cdn-security/keys'} context={'endpoint'}></MethodEndpoint>

<Heading id={'request'} as={'h2'} className={'openapi-tabs__heading'} children={'Request'}></Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{ name: 'channelId', in: 'path', description: 'ID of the channel', schema: { type: 'string' }, required: true }]}
></ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema title={'Body'} body={undefined}></RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{
    '200': {
      description: '200',
      content: {
        'application/json': {
          examples: { Result: { value: '{\n   "keys": [\n     {"id" : "key-id"}\n   ] \n}' } },
          schema: {
            type: 'object',
            properties: { keys: { type: 'array', items: { type: 'object', properties: { id: { type: 'string', example: 'key-id' } } } } },
          },
        },
      },
    },
    '400': {
      description: '400',
      content: { 'application/json': { examples: { Result: { value: '{}' } }, schema: { type: 'object', properties: {} } } },
    },
  }}
></StatusCodes>
